creator: ds@ukrhub.net
text:
Russian translation of articles/formatting-media has become outdated due to changes in the original text.

Fix: 

There are patches in http://chaos.ukrhub.net/FDP/formatting-media/doc.ru.articles.formatting-media.diff.tbz that may update the translation.
How-To-Repeat:   Just compare the revision of http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/formatting-media/article.sgml and 'Original revision' in http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/doc/ru_RU.KOI8-R/articles/formatting-media/article.sgml?rev=1.3;content-type=text%2Fplain
